英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普

zh.St Michael, Appleby, Westmorland, Englan: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Veteripont於大約1195年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素時，她的父親Robert de Vieuxpont33歲，母親Idonea de Builly22歲。她於1219年與Thomas de Greystoke在英國波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年在英國波藍德格斯托可享年51歲。

英国英格兰林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普

zh-hans.St Michael, Appleby, Westmorland, Englan: 英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Veteripont于大约1195年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德卡素时，她的父亲Robert de Vieuxpont33岁，母亲Idonea de Builly22岁。她于1219年与Thomas de Greystoke在英国波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1245年在英国波藍德格斯托可享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Veteripont was born about 1195, in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Vieuxpont, was 33 and her mother, Idonea de Builly, was 22. She married Thomas de Greystoke in 1219, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1245, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Veteripont est née environ 1195, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Vieuxpont, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Builly, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Greystoke en 1219, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Veteripont um 1195 in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Vieuxpont 33 und ihre Mutter Idonea de Builly 22. Sie hat 1219 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England Thomas de Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Veteripont è nata il circa 1195 nel Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Vieuxpont, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Idonea de Builly, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Greystoke nel 1219, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1245, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Veteripontが約1195年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Vieuxpontは33歳，母Idonea de Buillyは22歳であった。1219年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでThomas de Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Veteripont(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Vieuxpont(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea de Builly(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Thomas de Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

Grimsthorpe, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Veteripont nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Vieuxpont, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Builly, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Greystoke em 1219, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Veteripont родилась около 1195 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Vieuxpont было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Builly, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Greystoke в 1219 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Veteripont nació aproximadamente 1195, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Vieuxpont, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Idonea de Builly, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas de Greystoke en 1219, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1245, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
